KXPLLGAME-26JUL11DENBOS-BOS.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
KXPLLGAME-26JUL11DENBOS-BOS.rules_primary: If Boston Cannons wins the Denver Outlaws vs Boston Cannons Premier Lacrosse League game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXPLLGAME-26JUL11DENBOS-BOS.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team who wins the Denver Outlaws vs Boston Cannons Premier Lacrosse League game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026. If this game is postponed/delayed and played within 14 days of the originally scheduled start time, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished. If a postponed/cancelled game is not played or is rescheduled further than 14 days out, the market will resolve to a fair price for each team in accordance with the rules. If the game is declared a tie, the market will resolve to 50/50 for both teams.
KXPLLGAME-26JUL11DENBOS-BOS.title: Denver Outlaws vs Boston Cannons Winner?
